title: × cornoathyrium glabrescens
intro: × Cornoathyrium glabrescens is a hybrid plant species in the family Cystopteridaceae, belonging to the order Polypodiales and family Cystopteridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. × Cornoathyrium glabrescens is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
